subject: Status Report
description: Properly secure network devices with special mechanisms and tools (e.g., authentication for device management, secure communications, strong authentication mechanisms). Implement active monitoring and pattern recognition to protect devices from attack. [Original CobiT 4.1 Reference: Deliver and Support / Ensure Systems Security / Network Security : DS.5.10.1.3]
d_name: Check that each Gateway's Anti-Bot configuration is activated according to the policy
cb_recommendation: Each Gateway should be configured to work according to the profiles defined in the Anti-Bot policy. The Activation Mode should be set to 'According to Policy' and not 'Detect Only'.
